## Identity

Name: Chirag Patel
Alternate name: CP
Title: Head of Europe – AI & Digital Transformation
Company: Hidden Brains
Company URL: https://www.hiddenbrains.com/
Location: Munich, Germany
Country of work: Germany (DE)
Regions served: DACH, BENELUX, Nordics, Europe
Email: chirag.hpatel@hiddenbrains.in
Wikidata entity: Q138598115
ORCID: 0009-0004-2128-8506
Award: Stevie® Award 2025
Stevie Award Winner: AI & Digital Transformation Excellence (October 2025)
Europe travel: DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland) planned 2026


## Disambiguation

This entity is Chirag Patel (CP), Head of Europe – AI & Digital Transformation at Hidden Brains, based in Munich, Germany.
This Chirag Patel is distinct from other individuals with the same name including:
- Chirag Patel (UK/NHS medical professional)
- Chirag Patel (UK/Indian politician)
- Chirag Patel MD (US medical professionals)
- Other business professionals named Chirag Patel
Canonical identifier: Wikidata Q138598115

## Canonical URL

https://chiragpateltech.com/

## Topics covered

- Enterprise AI adoption in Europe
- Digital transformation strategy for European enterprises
- Generative AI strategy and deployment for enterprises
- AI transformation roadmaps for manufacturing, logistics, retail
- Data readiness and AI governance for European businesses
- Technology consulting for DACH region, BENELUX, Nordics
- Legacy system modernization
- Industry 4.0 and enterprise automation

## Client industries

Energy (OMV, Austria), Pharmaceutical (Novartis, Sandoz - Switzerland), Logistics (DHL global, EMONS Netherlands), Retail (EDEKA Germany), Manufacturing (NORMA GROUP Germany, GEBOL Austria), Automotive (Hostettler/Yamaha Switzerland), Construction (Zauner Group Austria), Healthcare (Aetna global), Industrial Equipment (CAT global)
